name: Vampire Prison
short_description: This game is a escape game from a prison cell ruled by vampires.
detailed_description:
[Summary]

They were taken away as food for Vampire. It is a prison.

They put me in a cell and I can't move around freely.

If you stay there, the Vampire will continue to suck your blood and you will eventually die!

Solve the traps and riddles that obstruct your escape and try to get to the exit!

Can you escape from a guarded prison?

Escape from the Vampire's prison and escape from the Vampire's prison!

Vampires will appear and attack you while you are exploring the prison!

When you encounter a Vampire, run away and hide yourself.

Vampires patrol the prison, so it is important to understand their behavior patterns.

Advance without being noticed.

Use items to avoid danger!

You may get items and hints during your search.

Let's search and get items to avoid danger!
